let w0: Complex satisfy { exists(k3: Complex, k4: Complex) { Add.add[Complex](Mul.mul[Complex](w0, k4), Mul.mul[Complex](k3, k4)) != Mul.mul[Complex](Add.add[Complex](w0, k3), k4) } }
exists(k5: Complex, k6: Complex) { Add.add[Complex](Mul.mul[Complex](w0, k6), Mul.mul[Complex](k5, k6)) != Mul.mul[Complex](Add.add[Complex](w0, k5), k6) }
let w1: Complex satisfy { exists(k7: Complex) { Add.add[Complex](Mul.mul[Complex](w0, k7), Mul.mul[Complex](w1, k7)) != Mul.mul[Complex](Add.add[Complex](w0, w1), k7) } }
exists(k8: Complex) { Add.add[Complex](Mul.mul[Complex](w0, k8), Mul.mul[Complex](w1, k8)) != Mul.mul[Complex](Add.add[Complex](w0, w1), k8) }
let w31: Complex satisfy { Add.add[Complex](Mul.mul[Complex](w0, w31), Mul.mul[Complex](w1, w31)) != Mul.mul[Complex](Add.add[Complex](w0, w1), w31) }
function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex, x2: Complex) { Add.add[Complex](Mul.mul[Complex](x0, x1), Mul.mul[Complex](x2, x1)) = Mul.mul[Complex](Add.add[Complex](x0, x2), x1) }(w0, w31, w1)
exists(k0: Complex) { Mul.mul[Complex](k0, Zero.0[Complex]) != Zero.0[Complex] }
let w0: Complex satisfy { Mul.mul[Complex](w0, Zero.0[Complex]) != Zero.0[Complex] }
function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { Mul.mul[Complex](x0, x1) = Mul.mul[Complex](x1, x0) }(Zero.0[Complex], w0)
function(x0: Complex) { Mul.mul[Complex](Zero.0[Complex], x0) = Zero.0[Complex] }(w0)
exists(k0: Complex) { Mul.mul[Complex](Zero.0[Complex], k0) != Zero.0[Complex] }
let w0: Complex satisfy { Mul.mul[Complex](Zero.0[Complex], w0) != Zero.0[Complex] }
function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { Mul.mul[Complex](x0, x1) = Mul.mul[Complex](x1, x0) }(w0, Zero.0[Complex])
function(x0: Complex) { Mul.mul[Complex](x0, Zero.0[Complex]) = Zero.0[Complex] }(w0)
function(x0: Complex) { -x0.re = (-x0).re }(a)
function(x0: Complex) { -x0.im = (-x0).im }(a)
function(x0: Real) { x0 + -x0 = Real.0 }(a.re)
function(x0: Real) { x0 + -x0 = Real.0 }(a.im)
function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { Complex.new(x0.re + x1.re, x0.im + x1.im) = x0 + x1 }(a, -a)
exists(k0: Complex) { Add.add[Complex](k0, Neg.neg[Complex](k0)) != Zero.0[Complex] }
let w0: Complex satisfy { Add.add[Complex](w0, Neg.neg[Complex](w0)) != Zero.0[Complex] }
function(x0: Complex) { Add.add[Complex](x0, Neg.neg[Complex](x0)) = Zero.0[Complex] }(w0)

goal: forall(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }
proof: exists(k0: Complex, k1: Complex) { Mul.mul[Complex](k1, k0) != Mul.mul[Complex](k0, k1) }
let w0: Complex satisfy { exists(k2: Complex) { Mul.mul[Complex](k2, w0) != Mul.mul[Complex](w0, k2) } }
exists(k3: Complex) { Mul.mul[Complex](k3, w0) != Mul.mul[Complex](w0, k3) }
let w1: Complex satisfy { Mul.mul[Complex](w1, w0) != Mul.mul[Complex](w0, w1) }
function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { Mul.mul[Complex](x0, x1) = Mul.mul[Complex](x1, x0) }(w1, w0)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { Complex.new(x0, x1).re = x0 }(Real.0, Real.0)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { Complex.new(x0, x1).re = x0 }(Real.1, Real.0)

goal: forall(x0: Complex) { x0 != Complex.0 implies x0 * x0.inverse = Complex.1 }
proof: exists(k0: Complex) { k0 != Zero.0[Complex] and Mul.mul[Complex](k0, Inverse.inverse[Complex](k0)) != One.1[Complex] }
let w0: Complex satisfy { w0 != Zero.0[Complex] and Mul.mul[Complex](w0, Inverse.inverse[Complex](w0)) != One.1[Complex] }
function(x0: Complex) { Mul.mul[Complex](x0, Inverse.inverse[Complex](x0)) = One.1[Complex] or Zero.0[Complex] = x0 }(w0)
